title: Anchored Spec — EA Decision
description: An architecture decision record documenting a key design choice with NIST traceability.

rationale.description: Rationale for the decision, including how it addresses NIST requirements

relatedRequirements.description: Requirement IDs related to this decision (REQ, SREQ, DREQ, TREQ, IREQ)

nistFunction.description: NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) function this decision supports

riskFrameworkStep.description: NIST Risk Management Framework (RMF) step that drove this decision

zeroTrustComponent.description: NIST SP 800-207 Zero Trust Architecture component affected by this decision

complianceFrameworks.description: Compliance frameworks this decision satisfies (e.g., NIST CSF, FedRAMP, SOC2)

riskLevel.description: Risk level associated with this decision

governanceImpact.description: How this decision affects security, operational resilience, and compliance posture
